retrieved_result: Kevin James comedy Kevin Can Wait gets series order from CBS Mike Pont/Wire Image Natalie Abrams May 12, 2016 AT 12:00 PM EDTCBS has given a series order to Kevin Can Wait, a comedy starring Kevin James, EW has learned. Reuniting with the network after his run on The King Of Queens, James will star in the multi-camera comedy as a newly retired police officer
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about a TV show's series order and has no relation to easy DIY room decoration ideas.

history.title: Kevin James comedy Kevin Can Wait gets series order from CBS
history.description: Mike Pont/Wire Image Natalie Abrams May 12, 2016 AT 12:00 PM EDTCBS has given a series order to Kevin Can Wait, a comedy starring Kevin James, EW has learned. Reuniting with the network after his run on The King Of Queens, James will star in the multi-camera comedy as a newly retired police officer
